test_cases.name: niah_medium
test_cases.description: NIAH: retrieve embedded fact from medium context
test_cases.prompt: The weather today is sunny. Birds are singing in the trees. The river flows gently through the valley. Mountains rise in the distance. The password to the vault is diamond.
